---
title: "Analyzing US Births and Basketball Recruits"
author: "Alex Liu"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```
```{r}
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
#| label: nba_recruits_summary
# Read NBA recruits, select columns, and show summary
nba_recruits <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") %>%
  select(rank, nba_mean_ws48, top_mean_wa, total_seasons, drafted)
 
```{r}
summary(nba_recruits)
```
summary(nba_recruits)
```

```{r}
#| label: tier_counts
# Read full recruits file and count players by tier
tier_counts <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") %>%
  count(tier, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

print(tier_counts)
```

```{r}
#| label: nba_data_transform
#| cache: true
# Read recruits and convert `tier` to an ordered factor
basketball_raw <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx")

basketball_tibble <- basketball_raw %>%
  mutate(tier = factor(tier,
    levels = c("Never played", "Brief career", "Solid career", "All-Star level", "Superstar"),
    ordered = TRUE
  )) %>%
  {
    if ("recruit_group" %in% names(.)) {
      mutate(., recruit_group = factor(recruit_group,
        levels = c("#1–10", "#11–25", "#26–50", "#51–100", "Outside top 100"),
        ordered = TRUE
      ))
    } else {
      mutate(., recruit_group = factor(NA_character_,
        levels = c("#1–10", "#11–25", "#26–50", "#51–100", "Outside top 100"),
        ordered = TRUE
      ))
    }
  }

glimpse(basketball_tibble)
```

```{r}
#| label: tier_by_recruit_plot
#| fig.width: 7
#| fig.height: 5
#| echo: false
# Scatter: recruit `rank` vs `top_mean_wa`, colored by `tier`, with linear trend and labels
plot_scatter <- basketball_tibble %>%
  filter(!is.na(rank), !is.na(top_mean_wa)) %>%
  mutate(rank = as.numeric(rank))

# pick notable players to label (top 4 by `top_mean_wa`)
label_data <- plot_scatter %>%
  arrange(desc(top_mean_wa)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 4)

p <- ggplot(plot_scatter, aes(x = rank, y = top_mean_wa, color = tier)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black") +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = 'reverse') +
  labs(x = "Recruit rank", y = "Top mean win/48 (top_mean_wa)",
       title = "Recruit rank vs. Top mean WS/48, colored by career tier") +
  theme_minimal()

if (requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(ggrepel)
  p <- p + geom_text_repel(data = label_data, aes(label = name),
                           size = 3, show.legend = FALSE)
} else {
  p <- p + geom_text(data = label_data, aes(label = name),
                     hjust = -0.1, size = 3, show.legend = FALSE)
}

print(p)
```
